description: Persistent source dictionary for small rising products used by Hackbase.ai's idea pipeline. The entry frame is intentionally compact and optimized for downstream ideation.

fieldIntent.name: Human-readable product/project name.
fieldIntent.sourceCategory: Where this source came from: hackathon_winner, github_rising, product_gallery, etc.
fieldIntent.codeUrl: Public code URL if available, otherwise null.
fieldIntent.concept: One-sentence explanation of what the product does.
fieldIntent.problemSolved: The concrete user problem or friction.
fieldIntent.coreUserInput: What the user gives the product.
fieldIntent.outputArtifact: What comes back: card, map, checklist, score, simulator, route, plan, etc.
fieldIntent.interactionPattern: What the user touches, sees, compares, or controls.
fieldIntent.whyItGotAttention: Why judges, users, developers, or makers reacted.
fieldIntent.noveltyKernel: The small non-obvious insight that makes it interesting.
fieldIntent.transferableStructure: What can move to another domain without copying.
fieldIntent.ideaKernel: Compressed idea seed used by Step2.
fieldIntent.transformationAxes: How it can be mutated: substitute, combine, adapt, reverse, output_form_shift, etc.
fieldIntent.attentionProof: Awards, stars, launch reaction, comments, public usage, or other evidence.
fieldIntent.bestRemixTargets: Themes where the value core may transfer.
fieldIntent.evidenceLevel: A/B/C/D evidence grade. A has public demo/code/reaction; B has demo or video and meaningful evidence; C is writeup-only or thin; D is mention-only.
fieldIntent.observedFields: Fields directly supported by source evidence.
fieldIntent.inferredFields: Fields inferred by AI or scripts. Facts such as awards, UI, code, and reaction must not be inferred.
fieldIntent.missingFields: Unavailable fields that should remain unknown rather than fabricated.
fieldIntent.usePolicy: primary_source_core, weak_context, candidate_only, or exclude. Only primary_source_core should feed Step2 as a strong source core.
